title: The Science of Sutton SignWriting
subtitle: Language, literacy, brain pathways, and SignWriting as research infrastructure
description: A research series on the science of signed language, written sign, literacy, and the infrastructure needed to study them well.

publication_strategy.notes: The series serves as the umbrella research identity, while entries, essays, evidence notes, reports, and datasets remain distinct citable artifacts in a modular, expandable record.
